577361696.jp_real: うーん、わかってないな、ラクリュウさんは。
577361696.en_literal: Huh, you don't get it, do you, Rakuryou-san?
577361696.english: Boo! For all your ancient knowledge, you just don't get it!

530196320.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
530196320.jp_real: 当然だ。トク。オレ様を誰だと思ってやがる。
530196320.en_literal: Of course. Who do you think I am?
530196320.english: Just who do you think I am?

128747571.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
128747571.jp_real: フロボロス、ご飯の時間だよ。
128747571.english: Ouroboros! Time for a little snacky snack!

57210574.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
57210574.jp_real: いいぜ。錬金術の真髄を見せてやる。
57210574.en_literal: Alright. I'll show you the true essence of alchemy.
57210574.english: Am I the founder of alchemy? Better buckle up, kid!

679431354.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
679431354.jp_real: 面倒くせえが仕方ねえ。乗ってやるか。
679431354.en_literal: You're a pain. But I'll humor you.
679431354.english: You're lucky I'm in a good mood right now.

419374765.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
419374765.jp_real: ま、オレ様に任せときな。
419374765.english: I fought rocks with more intelligence.

591260737.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
591260737.jp_real: もっとスゲーも数字見せてやってもいいんだぜ
591260737.en_literal: I can show you even more amazing stuff, Eugen.

764573893.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
764573893.jp_real: ロゼッタ、地殻に協力するなら、深層水を使った新薬を提供するぜ。
764573893.en_literal: If you're going to cooperate with the Empire, I'll provide you with a new medicine made from the Sacred Water.
764573893.english: I'll trade you the Philosopher's Toner for a skin sample.

883419514.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
883419514.jp_real: いい素材でも手に入ればいいがな。
883419514.en_literal: It's all about getting the right materials, I suppose.
883419514.english: Excellent. More opportunities to find volunteer test subjects.

411334437.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
411334437.jp_real: 騎士様、カリオストロを守って！

1048650660.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
1048650660.jp_real: おいおい、そう熱くなるもんじゃねーぜ。
1048650660.en_literal: Hey hey, this is getting hot, isn't it?
1048650660.english: Piece of advice: Don't waste good threats on pathetic foes.

239191250.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
239191250.jp_real: タク、美少女をコキ使うもんじゃねーぜ。
239191250.en_literal: Hmph. I'm not some delicate little girl who needs coddling.
239191250.english: What they get for wasting my time.

829941798.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
829941798.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、次も頑張っていこう！
829941798.english: I'm just a little ray of sunshine!

213505527.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
213505527.jp_real: 真理を見抜けなければ、錬金術なんてやってられねえからな。
213505527.en_literal: If I can't see through the truth, I can't do alchemy.
213505527.english: Huh. One of you numbskulls actually understands the foundation of alchemy.

436838160.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
436838160.jp_real: あんたに全員を任せない選択肢はねえだろ
436838160.en_literal: I don't have any choice but to leave everything to you.
436838160.english: Have at it! That's where a clumsy bull belongs!

1004239263.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
1004239263.jp_real: そんなこと言っちゃダメなんだぞ
1004239263.en_literal: You shouldn't say things like that!

881190604.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
881190604.jp_real: レッツゴー！バザラガさん

424246865.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
424246865.jp_real: 天才で美少女のカリオストロに、好きなんてないもん。
424246865.en_literal: Genius and beautiful girl like me, I don't have a crush on anyone!

302149871.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
302149871.jp_real: ほう。素直に褒めるとは、可愛げがあるな。
302149871.en_literal: Oh? To be so honest in your praise... you've got a cute side to you.
302149871.english: Huh. You're kinda cute when you're being all pure and honest.

519042333.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
519042333.jp_real: さあいうシエテさんもね
519042333.english: You didn't break a sweat either!

594052023.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
594052023.jp_real: レン金術に興味が湧いたか？
594052023.en_literal: Heh heh. Are you interested in alchemy?
594052023.english: An alchemist never reveals her tricks.

9641619.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
9641619.jp_real: 脳みそが筋肉ってやつか、こいつは。
9641619.en_literal: So your brain's made of muscle, huh? This guy...
9641619.english: Ugh. How many more muscle brains can this crew hold?

173957244.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
173957244.jp_real: 天才美少女錬金術師に任せなさい！
173957244.en_literal: Leave it to the genius alchemist!
173957244.english: Super cute genius alchemist Cagliostro here to save the day!

797271682.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
797271682.jp_real: ふん。次も外すんじゃねーぞ。
797271682.english: Hmph. Maybe my antics put the target in your sight. Ever think of that?

62365473.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
62365473.jp_real: カリオストロはどんなヘアスタイルもバッチコイだよ！
62365473.en_literal: Cagliostro's hair is so perfect, no matter the style!
62365473.english: Cagliostro can rock any hairstyle, silly!

68351491.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
68351491.jp_real: 属性点こもりのお前に言われたくねーよ。
68351491.en_literal: I don't wanna be told that by a low-level, low-tier, low-life like you.
68351491.english: Says the literal embodiment of an entire element.
